form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Steam Machine, a rival who he faces again; when 40 metres sixth at Ararat over 2195m in a 0-1 WIN race on March 23. Can't see him featuring.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over-raced when racing on the marker pegs.
Checked when Hanover Jack hung out near the 200m.
Hung in and contacted marker pegs as the field raced towards the first turn.
Shifted out slightly near the 500m and locked wheels with Crime Boss.

form.formComment: Last start a big 3.5 m win as favourite (Sr4) at Terang (2:40.90) beating Captain Wilson in NR up to 50 on March 27 at $2.30. Great chance to win again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start a big 3.5 m win as favourite (Sr4) at Terang (2:40.90) beating Captain Wilson in NR up to 50 on March 27 at $2.30. Great chance to win again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position at the start despite the efforts of its driver.
Hung in during the score up and was out of position as the start was effected.
Out of position when start effected.
Out of position when start effected.

form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Steam Machine, who he meets again; when 50 metres ninth at Ararat over 2195m in a 0-1 WIN race on March 23. Can't have on that basis.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well beaten last start by Steam Machine, who he meets again; when 50 metres ninth at Ararat over 2195m in a 0-1 WIN race on March 23. Can't have on that basis.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired over the concluding stages to eventually be beaten 52.0m.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr7) over 2195m after being wide early at Ararat beaten 40 m by Steam Machine (2:41.40) in 0-1 WIN on March 23 at $19. At his previous start 6th (Fr3) over 1780m at this track, at the bell was 4th-6.2 beaten 10 m by Yankee Mojoh (2:10.70) in 2 LIFETIME WINS on March 6 at $4.60. Makes plenty of appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for a clear run until approaching 100m.
Broke gait in the score up.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr7) over 1609m at Newcastle, beaten 35 m by Stellar Stride (1:55.80) in NR up to 48 on February 27 at $26. At the run before surrendered the lead and finished 4th (Fr1) over 1609m after showing early speed at Newcastle, at the bell was 3rd-4.38 beaten 15 m by Hes My Reason (1:53.90) in NR 45 to 49 on February 23 at $7.50. Must be included.

form.formComment: Resumed when beaten 6 m fourth behind Im Wesley at Cranbourne over 1609m in a NR 47 to 52 on March 29. Confident of improvement on the first-up effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumed when beaten 6 m fourth behind Im Wesley at Cranbourne over 1609m in a NR 47 to 52 on March 29. Confident of improvement on the first-up effort.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced near the 50m when Keayang Seaside shifted out.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Fr2) over 1790m at Ararat, beaten 35 m by Wazowski (2:10.30) in NR 45 to 50 on March 23 at $21. Two runs back solid effort when 2nd (Fr2) over 1780m at this track beaten 2.5 m by Grinning Reactor (2:15.20) in 2 LIFETIME WINS on December 30 at $2.90. One of the better hopes.

form.formComment: Last start by 6 m (Sr3) at Ararat (2:41.40) beating Black Opal Jack in 0-1 WIN on March 23 at $2.80 at the bell was leading 4.9. Another win looks on the cards.
